channel.title: gamedeveloper
channel.description: Game development news and technical features

item.title: Modernizing the Rendering of Minecraft
item.dc:creator: Game Developer Staff
item.description: At GDC 2026, the team describes its real-time graphics pipeline, shader architecture, and GPU optimization work.

item.title: A Practical Guide to Studio Contract Reviews
item.dc:creator: Game Developer Staff
item.description: A production guide for reviewing common studio agreements.
